channel.title: Daily Feed (Updated 9 AM BD)
channel.description: Daily Feed (Updated 9 AM BD) generated by script

item.title: UN Secretary-General Race: Financial Disclosures, an Explainer
item.description: The 1 for 8 Billion nongovernmental organization has campaigned for financial transparency and declarations of conflicts of interest in the United Nations secretary-general selection process since the group’s launching in 2014. The need for financial disclosures from UN senior staff is well established within the system; indeed, confidential financial disclosure statements are required for senior ... Read more

item.title: How Kyrgyzstan built a system to support domestic violence survivors
item.description: Domestic violence was not something people spoke about openly in Kyrgyzstan in the 1990s following the collapse of the Soviet Union, but after a long road of dedicated efforts, there are now laws addressing family abuse, crisis centres and hotlines while human rights defenders tackle such new challenges as sexual slavery.
